title: Caro122's Better Leather
description: Makes leather much easier to use and work with along with a way to craft it
body:
This mod adds better leather to the game
 

Added items:

sodium:

sodium is natrully obtained by mining sand. it is a relatively rare drop. don't go underwater with it or it will 'react'


 

Washing agent:

washing agent is used to undye armour and turn rotten flesh into leather

It uses blue dye, copper and sodium


 

Craftable leather:

It uses rotten flesh and washing agent




Undyable leather:

you can undye dyed leather in thew crafting table using washing agent,

To undye leather place 1 washing agent in a crafting table with the desired peice of leather armour.




Uncraftable leather:

Have you ever had low durability leather of useless horse armour? now you can uncraft them and get a small amount of leather back in return. it also includes ALL types of horse armour.

To uncraft any leather gear just place it in a crafting table. nothing else required.


 

I hope you enjoy this mod!
